description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, dark wooden handle with a gentle ergonomic curve and a slightly flared end for improved grip. The handle displays subtle wood grain patterns and appears to be smoothly finished. The axe head is forged from dark metal, with a broad, slightly curved cutting edge and a pronounced beard, giving it a traditional yet practical appearance. The blade is securely mounted onto the handle, with the eye of the axe head fitting snugly around the wood. The poll of the axe is flat and squared, suitable for light hammering tasks. No visible markings, engravings, or labels are present on either the handle or the blade.
description: A traditional hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a broad, dark metal blade. The design is practical, with a smooth grip and a securely mounted head.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the top of the handle, showing the rounded end and the wood grain pattern.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the full length of the curved wooden handle and the broad, dark metal blade with a pronounced beard.
description_view_2: The axe is viewed from the top of the blade, emphasizing the narrow profile of the cutting edge and the secure mounting of the head to the handle.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the handle's ergonomic curve and the blade's flat poll and wide edge.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a flared end, smooth finish, visible wood grain, oval cross-section, ergonomic grip.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad steel blade with a curved cutting edge, pronounced beard, flat poll, and no decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade eye fitted over the handle.
